name: Ham Delites
recipeIngredient: 1 package of cooked ham, diced into 4 oz portions
1 package of Swiss cheese, sliced into 4 oz portions
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the spread by combining butter, mustard, poppy seeds, Worcestershire sauce, and grated onion.
2. Place the party rolls on a baking sheet.
3. Spread the prepared mixture evenly over each roll.
4. Add ham and sliced Swiss cheese to fit each roll.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
